name: Overclocked
desc: This ship has been tuned and tweaked to the point where it requires constant maintenance, consuming %s percent of its logistics cost in supplies per day even when at full combat readiness.

name: Overclocked
desc: This ship has been tuned and tweaked to the point where it requires constant maintenance, consuming %s percent of its logistics cost in supplies per day even when at full combat readiness.

name: Overclocked
desc: This ship has been tuned and tweaked to the point where it requires constant maintenance, consuming %s percent of its logistics cost in supplies per day even when at full combat readiness, and peak CR duration is affected by %s percent from the original unmodified hull.
short: Overclocked - Increased performance and maintenance, reduced peak CR timer.

name: Pre-militarized Hullform
desc: Significant attempts to align the profile of this ship with a fully militarized equivalent have, generally, failed. Large bulkheads and poorly integrated engine flumes offset the mil-spec coatings and materiality. Increases sensor profile by %s percent.

name: Bullseye Suite
desc: The flux systems of this ship are enhanced and mobility systems improved to better suit a working life dedicated to warfare.

name: ASP Syndicate Sponsored
desc: This craft is extremely well looked after, with a highly polished exterior and carefully maintained systems.
short: This ship comes with an ASP maintenance package

name: Integrated Point Defense AI
desc: Gives all small non-missile weapons the ability to automatically target incoming enemy missiles.
short: All small non-missile weapons act as point-defense.

name: Metastable Drive Field
desc:
Ask anyone who works on these drives and they will tell you that metastable is close enough to stable. They will also tell you not to give it a push.

Provides bonuses to speed at high hard flux levels, up to %s percent at full hard flux, but stress can trigger catastrophic overloads dangerous to both sides. Since the engine is designed to fail in a mostly predictable direction, the ship is also more likely to be recoverable when, not if, it is destroyed in combat.
short: Speed boost at high flux and dangerous overloads.

name: Shocking Behaviour
desc: Arcs back to parent station at high flux

name: Octopus No Shields
desc: Prohibits shield hullmods, as the built in shield module does all the work

name: Wibble Wobble
desc: Makes things go a bit wibbly wobbly

name: Wobble Wibble
desc: Makes things go a bit wobbly wibbly

name: Blue Zapper
desc:
When the first crews began modifying the Tangerine, it felt like a new frontier in drive technology was opening beneath their hands.

It was not a frontier. It was a rising wave, and it kept getting bigger until it broke. Too many good people vanished into the aftermath, and the Tangerine program was cancelled.
short: Speed boost at high flux and dangerous overloads.

name: Born with a Silver Spanner
desc: The ship's hierarchy is dominated by Junk Pirates personnel, the sort who can keep a hull operational while every warning light argues otherwise. Provides %s higher peak operating time and %s slower degradation once CR time has depleted.

name: Survival Instincts
desc: The ship's systems have been attuned to P.A.C.K. technology. Arcane comms channels provide higher bandwidth for quicker response and marginally better maneuverability, while lower intercept exposure reduces the ship's sensor profile to %s of base.

name: Corporate Discipline
desc: A tidy desk means a tidy mind, or a tidy profit. ASP Syndicate crews are renowned for keeping an unusual level of cleanliness and general upkeep – reflecting in a %s improved CR level and %s improvements in flux handling.

name: P.A.C.K. Mesh
desc:
Arcane communications protocols helped P.A.C.K. remain hidden for generations. Linking deployed ships through the same resilient mesh boosts the operational envelope of interconnected hulls by sharing unusually high-resolution tactical data.

The mesh is not perfect. Similar hull types interfere with each other, so each ship only benefits from the first unique hull type contributing to the network.

COLLABORATIVE TARGETING DESIGNATION
Each (other) unique frigate hull deployed increases weapon range by %s each.

ADAPTIVE SHIELD MODULATION NETWORK
Each (other) unique destroyer hull deployed decreases shield damage received by %s each.

TACTICAL NAVIGATION ROUTING ARRAY
Each (other) unique cruiser hull deployed increases speed by %s each.

The mesh also enables PREDICTIVE WEAPON FIRE CONTROLS, reducing weapon flux cost by %s when 5 hulls are deployed together, and PRE-EMPTIVE SHIP FLUX MANAGEMENT ALGORITHMS, granting an additional %s bonus to base ship flux stats if 10 unique hulls are deployed together.
short: Receives fleet bonuses from other unique hull types deployed with the mesh system. Larger mixed fleets provide the strongest bonuses.
